description: A full formal specification of the enumeration is now included: the search iterates coprime pairs (a, d) with 1 ≤ a < d ≤ N, gcd(a,d)=1, and uses a wheel-sieve to enumerate denominators. Proof of completeness (all 1 ≤ d ≤ N are generated) is included in the supplementary material, Section F, and independently reproducible SHA-256 checksums (computed: dd7a15f...309e) of the full-range bitset are now supplied in the data archive.
